pr.title: Record: Trinity Ternary GPT — val_bpb 0.9650 (ternary roundtrip)

output.summary: Trinity ternary GPT pairs BitNet ternary QAT on a NeoMuon 10L/768d base with per-sample SLOT v2 delta+logit tuning using frozen hidden states.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Per-sample SLOT v2 optimizes temporary delta/logit params on each validation sample before scoring, so the only training occurs on validation tokens at eval time.
techniques: Ternary BitNet QAT on NeoMuon GPT
Per-sample SLOT v2 delta+logit tuning after frozen forward pass
